phrases.cultural_note: Beach bars are typically visible along the shoreline and serve as the primary point for drink orders.

likely_response.local: Στο beach bar, δίπλα στις ξαπλώστρες.
likely_response.translation_en: At the beach bar, next to the sunbeds.

responses.english: At the beach bar, next to the sunbeds.
responses.french: Στο beach bar, δίπλα στις ξαπλώστρες.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent sunbeds on this beach?
phrases.text_local: Πού ενοικιάζονται οι ξαπλώστρες στην παραλία;
phrases.cultural_note: On beaches, sunbed rental typically involves asking the designated attendant rather than a fixed counter.
